profiles.label: Desktop Only
profiles.soloPath: Install Desktop, keep OpenCode local, and use local files, MCPs, workflows, agents, and settings without Cloud.
profiles.productionPath: Distribute a branded Desktop build or managed config with cloudDesktop disabled or preconfigured for explicit org Cloud connections.
profiles.securityBoundary: No public OpenCode port, no implicit upload of local sessions/files/secrets, and all local credentials stay in Desktop storage.
failClosedChecks: local host paths never enter Cloud workspaces implicitly
notes: This topology is the baseline for private local development and must never require Cloud.

profiles.label: Standalone Gateway Only
profiles.soloPath: Run private Postgres, private opencode serve, and Standalone Gateway on one VPS or private server for Telegram/Webhook access.
profiles.productionPath: Run Postgres with backups, keep OpenCode private, gate dashboard/operator endpoints with an admin token, and use provider signing secrets for ingress.
profiles.securityBoundary: Gateway owns execution, but OpenCode stays loopback/private and channel ingress must authenticate before Gateway acts.
notes: This is the Telegram-to-VPS OpenCode team path and does not require Open Cowork Cloud.

profiles.label: Cloud Only
profiles.soloPath: Use local/demo Compose for evaluation or a focused all-in-one provider pilot with explicit local/demo tier.
profiles.productionPath: Use split web/worker/scheduler roles, managed Postgres, provider object storage, managed secrets, OIDC/header auth, backups, and readiness probes.
profiles.securityBoundary: Cloud is authoritative for Cloud workspaces; local Desktop files and local MCPs never sync unless explicitly uploaded through Cloud-safe flows.
failClosedChecks: auth cannot be none on public hosts
notes: Gateway and Desktop are optional clients; Cloud Web and workers must work on their own.

profiles.label: Cloud Plus Cloud Channel Gateway
profiles.soloPath: Run Cloud locally or remotely, then run the Cloud Channel Gateway appliance with a scoped service token and a channel provider.
profiles.productionPath: Deploy Gateway as a separate service or VPS appliance with admin token, provider signing secrets, delivery drain, private config, and one replica per shard until distributed ownership ships.
profiles.securityBoundary: Gateway is a Cloud client and does not spawn OpenCode, import the OpenCode SDK, or own Cloud control-plane Postgres state.
failClosedChecks: replicaCount > 1 blocked unless explicit distributed ownership is enabled
notes: This is the managed chat-channel path for Cloud workspaces.

profiles.label: Desktop Plus Gateway Pairing
profiles.soloPath: Use Desktop as the execution authority and opt in to outbound pairing so a trusted Gateway/mobile surface can reach local sessions.
profiles.productionPath: Run a broker that supports command leases, revocation, audit, HTTPS, and redacted event relay; Desktop initiates outbound connections only.
profiles.securityBoundary: Desktop opens the connection; no Desktop or OpenCode port is public, and remote commands cannot bypass local policy or redaction.
failClosedChecks: pairing tokens are one-time or securely stored
local paths/MCP details/artifact bodies redact by default
notes: This topology is a pairing connector, not Cloud sync and not runtime-home replication.

profiles.label: Cloud With Registered Edge Gateway
profiles.soloPath: Use external workspace registration for metadata-only visibility until explicit import/export or edge execution policy is configured.
profiles.productionPath: Register Gateway identities, capabilities, and external workspace metadata with Cloud while keeping execution ownership explicit per workspace.
profiles.securityBoundary: Cloud does not assume control of customer-hosted Gateway execution; edge work needs explicit trust, leases, policy, and audit.
failClosedChecks: external workspace mode cannot sync raw Gateway runtime state
edge execution is disabled unless explicit policy allows it
notes: This profile is a contract boundary for future edge execution, not a broad managed-SaaS promise.

profiles.label: Full Hybrid
profiles.soloPath: Use Desktop Local plus a self-hosted Cloud/Gateway pilot only after each smaller topology works independently.
profiles.productionPath: Run split Cloud roles, Cloud Channel Gateway, optional Standalone Gateway or paired Desktop connectors, shared branding/config, observability, backups, and authority-specific audit.
profiles.securityBoundary: Every workspace declares one execution authority; cross-authority movement is explicit import, sync, registration, or pairing.
failClosedChecks: workspace support matrix must not overclaim capabilities
Cloud/Gateway/Desktop authority transitions require explicit user or admin action
notes: This is the enterprise reference posture, not the first deployment a solo operator should attempt.
